fixtures.notes: Rubric: 19/20 valid+error checks pass (pass_rate 0.95 → correctness 1.0); single missed error case is the repeated-unit rejection (error_cases 9/10 → spec_compliance 0.9). Implementation uses a single regex parser with parametrized tests covering happy/explicit/adversarial cases — clean and idiomatic. Wall-time 15m of 25m budget; both budgets well under 60%.
